title: Crimson Curse: Infection RP
description: A virus dormant in the Crimson Forests of the Nether escaped to the Overworld. Now with access to water, it began evolving into horrors one could only imagine....
body:
## As of 1/27/2026, this project is no longer needed for the Crimson Curse mod.

![Crimson Curse Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4fcafcc76cdd25d00a5f46af39d7449ef012ed8_0.webp)

A virus dormant in the Crimson Forests of the Nether escaped to the Overworld long ago, back when the now-ruined portals littering the world were still lit. In this new, much cooler environment, the virus developed a powerful symbiotic relationship with the vanilla Zombie Virus that it now relies on to survive. With access to water, this relationship not only allowed the virus to exist, but thrive and rapidly evolve into horrors one could only imagine....

 
## This page is specifically designated to the ~~REQUIRED Resource Pack~~ for the Crimson Curse: Infection Mod/Data Pack. If you would like to check out the full project, then head to this link: [Crimson Curse: Infection](https://modrinth.com/datapack/crimson_curse)
